title: python3.12 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.12.12-3.0.1]
- Remove upstream URL reference

[3.12.12-3]
- Security fix for CVE-2025-13836
Resolves: RHEL-140978

[3.12.12-2]
- Security fix for CVE-2025-12084
Resolves: RHEL-135387
